title: code-task
description: Delegate a coding task to Codex or Claude Code sub-agent.

repo.description: Absolute path to the repo/directory to work in

scope.description: What to build or fix -- be specific about files, functions, behavior

tests.description: Whether to write/run tests. Default true.

test_command.description: Command to run tests (e.g. 'npm test', 'pytest'). Agent will infer if omitted.

agent.description: Which coding agent. 'auto' picks based on task complexity.

branch.description: Git branch to work on. Creates if doesn't exist.

pr.description: Whether to open a PR after completing the task

context_files.description: Additional files to include in the agent's context

_anti_patterns: Write failing test first. Don't start fixing without reproducing.
Verify dependencies exist before building on them.
Test before committing. Read the artifact, verify key data.
No scope creep. If config > 1 file for a simple concept, you're over-engineering.
